title: 香港新聞整合網站 hknewsurls

replies.msg:
傳送門：https://hknewsurl.gigalixirapp.com/
一站式集合咗香港40個以上嘅新聞網站，方便大家睇，比較唔同媒體對於同一議題嘅報道手法。
- 可以search by keyword
- 可以揀唔同嘅媒體 同一時間show出嚟
- 支持Progressive Web App (PWA) 啫係可以扮係native app 咁裝喺手機度

另外有Telegram bot https://t.me/newshk_bot
除咗無得search基本上都一樣

有啲網站 支持唔到 因為cloudflare 擋咗 例如 立場

PWA 裝嘅方法

iOS
1. Open Safari on your iPhone
2. Go to the website https://hknewsurl.gigalixirapp.com/
3. Tap the Share button on Safari
4. Find by slide to the right “Add to Home Screen.”
5. Tap it, then tap Add (top right)

Android
1. Open Chrome on your Android Mobile Device
2. Go to the website https://hknewsurl.gigalixirapp.com/
3. Tap Settings (Top right corner) on Chrome
4. Slide down and tap “Add to Home Screen.”

Android 唔知得唔得 無機試

thanks

係咪淨係得今日嘅新聞？

quote.msg:
thanks

係咪淨係得今日嘅新聞？
